title: 'Eliy`am #0463
definition:
Eliam = "God of the people" or "God is kinsman"

 1) Bathsheba's father
 2) a Gilonite warrior of David
nasbUsage:
Definition: Eliam = "God of the people" or "God is kinsman"

 1) Bathsheba's father
 2) a Gilonite warrior of David

    NASB:  God is kinsman, an Isr. name
